# Here Handyman | Trusted Handyman & Home Remodeling Services in Westchester County, NY

![Here Handyman - Trusted Handyman and Remodeling Services in Westchester County NY](https://www.herehandyman.com/assets/images/logo1.webp)

Reliable handyman and remodeling services with over 25 years of experience helping homeowners across Westchester County with quality repairs, renovations, installations, and home improvement projects.

Professional local handyman services for homeowners in White Plains, Scarsdale, Yonkers, New Rochelle, and surrounding Westchester County communities.

---

## Meet David — Owner of Here Handyman

Hi, I’m David, owner of Here Handyman.

For more than 25 years, I’ve been helping homeowners throughout Westchester County with reliable handyman services, remodeling, repairs, installations, and home improvement projects completed with care and attention to detail.

My goal is simple: provide honest work, dependable service, fair pricing, and quality craftsmanship homeowners can trust. Whether you need a small repair, a full remodel, TV mounting, flooring installation, drywall repair, bathroom renovation, or kitchen remodeling project, I treat every home like it’s my own.

If you, too, miss that warm neighborhood feeling where you know the person working on your home actually cares, feel free to reach out. I look forward to building genuine long-term relationships with homeowners across Westchester County and helping make every house feel more like home.

---

## Getting Started

Fast and simple ways to get your home project started.

- [Free Estimate Request](https://www.herehandyman.com/#contact): Request a free no-obligation estimate for your home project
- [Call or Text Us](tel:+15163500801): Reach us directly at (516) 350-0801 for scheduling, same-day appointments, and urgent repairs
- [Service Areas](#service-coverage): Check if we provide handyman services in your Westchester County area

---

## Our Services

Complete handyman, repair, remodeling, and home improvement solutions for homeowners.

- [Kitchen Remodeling](#kitchen-remodeling): Kitchen renovations, cabinet installation, countertops, backsplashes, and custom upgrades
- [Bathroom Renovations](#bathroom-renovations): Walk-in showers, vanities, tile installation, bathroom repairs, and full remodels
- [General Handyman Services](#general-handyman-services): Drywall repair, painting, plumbing fixture installation, carpentry, and home maintenance
- [Flooring Installation](#flooring-installation): Hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl plank flooring installation and repairs
- [Exterior Home Services](#exterior-home-services): Deck repairs, siding repair, exterior painting, gutters, windows, and doors
- [Emergency Repairs](#emergency-repairs): Fast response for leaks, storm damage, broken fixtures, and urgent home repairs

---

- And surrounding Westchester County communities

## Why Homeowners Choose Here Handyman

- **25+ Years of Experience**: Skilled workmanship backed by decades of hands-on experience
- **Reliable & Professional Service**: Clean, organized, respectful work from start to finish
- **Fully Insured**: Your home and project are protected
- **Quality Craftsmanship**: Attention to detail on every repair, installation, and renovation
- **Clear Communication**: Honest estimates, transparent pricing, and dependable scheduling
- **Wide Range of Services**: One trusted handyman company for nearly every home improvement need
- **Fast Response Times**: Quick scheduling available for urgent and same-day repair needs
- **Customer Satisfaction Focused**: We take pride in doing the job right the first time
- **Local Westchester Handyman**: Trusted by homeowners throughout Westchester County, NY

# Service Details

## Kitchen Remodeling

We help homeowners transform outdated kitchens into beautiful, functional, and modern living spaces.

Services include:
- Cabinet installation and replacement
- Countertop installation
- Tile backsplash installation
- Kitchen island construction
- Sink and faucet installation
- Appliance installation
- Lighting upgrades
- Drywall and painting
- Flooring installation

---

## Bathroom Renovations

Complete bathroom remodeling and repair services designed to improve comfort, appearance, and functionality.

Services include:
- Walk-in shower installation
- Shower door installation
- Vanity and sink replacement
- Bathroom tile installation
- Toilet replacement
- Waterproofing and caulking
- Exhaust fan installation
- Bathroom lighting upgrades
- Full bathroom remodeling

---

## General Handyman Services

Professional handyman and home repair services for homes, apartments, condos, and residential properties throughout Westchester County.

Services include:
- Drywall repair and patching
- Interior and exterior painting
- TV mounting
- Furniture assembly
- Door and window repairs
- Trim and molding installation
- Caulking and sealing
- Shelving and storage installation
- Minor plumbing repairs
- Outlet and light fixture replacement
- General home maintenance

---

## Flooring Installation

Professional flooring installation and repair services for all areas of the home.

Services include:
- Hardwood flooring
- Vinyl plank flooring
- Laminate flooring
- Tile flooring
- Floor repairs
- Baseboard installation
- Transition installation
- Subfloor preparation

---

## Exterior Home Services

Protect and improve your home's exterior with reliable repair and maintenance services.

Services include:
- Deck and porch repairs
- Exterior painting
- Siding repair
- Fence repair
- Gutter cleaning and repairs
- Window and door installation
- Exterior caulking
- Pressure washing

---

## Emergency Repairs

Fast and dependable help for urgent home repair situations.

Emergency services include:
- Water leaks
- Storm damage repairs
- Broken doors and windows
- Drywall damage
- Urgent fixture repairs
- Emergency home maintenance issues
- Same-day handyman repair services when available

---

## Our Service Process

1. Contact us by phone, text, or online form
2. Discuss your project and schedule an estimate
3. Receive a clear and detailed quote
4. Schedule the work at a convenient time
5. Professional completion with attention to detail
6. Final walkthrough to ensure satisfaction

---

## About Here Handyman

At Here Handyman, we believe homeowners deserve reliable service, quality workmanship, honest communication, and repairs done the right way.

Whether you need a small repair, a full remodel, ongoing home maintenance, or professional handyman services, we are committed to helping you improve and protect your home with dependable professional service throughout Westchester County, NY.

We proudly provide local handyman services, remodeling, repair work, installations, and home improvement solutions homeowners can trust.

Ready to start your project?

Call or text Here Handyman today at (516) 350-0801 for reliable handyman services, home repairs, remodeling, and professional home improvement solutions throughout Westchester County, NY.
